calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER OMAR MEDINA'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER AND FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Omar Medina.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:47 a.m. and concluding at 9:52 a.m.

Petitioner Omar Medina appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed October 16, 2023.

Order to show cause filed October 16, 2023.

Notice of hearing filed December 05, 2023.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name and gender.

Order Recognizing change of gender and sex identifier and for name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day. (D505)
